name: Stellaluna
developer: Brøderbund, Jordan Freeman Group, Living Books, Wanderful Interactive Storybooks
publisher: ZOOM Platform Media, Wanderful Interactive Storybooks
short_description: Explore Jannell Cannon’s classic "Stellaluna", adapted from its original storybook into an interactive adventure! With full narration, the story comes alive one word at a time with lots of bonuses and secrets to discover!
detailed_description:
Explore and share Jannell Cannon’s classic "Stellaluna", adapted from its original storybook into an interactive animated adventure! With full narration, the story comes alive one word at a time, offering an easy to digest reading mode which is fully animated and voiced. Increase the challenge and the fun with an interactive at-your-own-pace option with lots of bonuses and secrets to discover!

Stellaluna is the story of a young bat travelling with her mother late in the evening. After an encounter with an Owl, the young bat, named Stellaluna, is separated from her mother and must fend on her own. Not yet able to fly, a chance encounter with some baby birds and their mother might just be the opportunity for Stellaluna to learn. However, there may just be a few more lessons to learn about her new bird friends, despite all of their apparent differences.

Since it's first release in 1996, Living Books' rendition of "Stellaluna" has been enjoyed by countless children. Step-by-step, the reader will find the story is full of all the charming encounters that have made Jannell Cannon’s, "Stellaluna", an enduring classic. All while providing new ways to interact with the book again and again.

  • Both interactive and story modes suitable for different levels of skill.

  • Interact with the pictures and discover hidden scenes.

  • Attractive animations bring the characters to life.

  • Fully voiced as you read! Chock full of memorable scenes!

  • A revitalized re-release compatible with modern platforms.

  • A great way to improve reading skills.
